sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِأَشْتَرِيَ دَوَاءً لِلصُّدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u apoteku da kupim lijek protiv glavobolje.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy to buy medicine for a headache.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي الصَّيْدَلِيُّ عَنْ عُمْرِي وَحَالَتِي الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Apotekar me je pitao za godine i zdravstveno stanje.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist asked me about my age and health condition.

sentences.translation: Kupio sam lijek i popio ga s vodom.
sentences.translationEn: I bought the medicine and drank it with water.
